summary:
All passing. Two bugs fixed:

1. **`server.go:84-91`** — The SET handler acknowledged writes (`+OK`) after only buffering to the WAL, not after fsyncing. On crash, buffered-but-unsynced data was lost despite being acknowledged. Fixed by calling `wal.Sync()` before returning `+OK`.

2. **`test.sh:39`** — The grep pattern `"LOST"` matched the summary line (`0 LOST out of 50 acked`) even when no keys were actually lost. Fixed by anchoring the pattern to `"^LOST"` to only match actual per-key loss lines.
